text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Thursday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Thursday, June 13. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: That is a clean implementation. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Updating our financial spreadsheets. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Budget tracking is updated. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. Great update. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has scheduling portal. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I checked the recent logs for that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping scheduling portal in the MVP. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Got it, Mike. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: I've logged your vitals. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Planning for future education costs. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Budget tracking is updated. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: School projects are fun. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /user/verify under load. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /user/verify. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I can help with that. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Managing some allergy issues today. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. That's good medical feedback. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
